calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Francisco Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Margo Rodriguez, General Manager for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Catherine McMinn.
Defendant filed her amended answer to plaintiff's complaint on December 18, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 8, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed & served on December 22, 2017.

Exhibit 1: Proof of Service of Three-Day Notice to Quit...............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, and against defendant Catherine McMinn, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $322.14.
Costs - 410.00.
Total - $732.14.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 55 Mason Street, Unit 225, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The Rental Agreement is canceled and the Lease is forfeited.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of Exhibit 1.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Margo Rodriguez.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Catherine McMinn is present.
Attorney James Cook appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of January 8, 2018 remains on calendar. (501)
